subtasks.title: Analyze existing RunPod deployment scripts
subtasks.description: Examine all RunPod shell scripts and deployment configuration files to understand current setup and identify areas affected by expansion indices integration
subtasks.details:
Use Glob to find all RunPod-related scripts (*.sh files), examine their contents with Read, search for model deployment configurations, data loading mechanisms, and dependency management. Focus on understanding how the current pipeline handles data and model deployment.
<info added on 2025-10-13T20:11:31.753Z>
Completed analysis of RunPod deployment scripts. Found run_remote.sh correctly configured with GPU flags (--over hardware=gpu) for all CLI commands (lines 8-12). RUNPOD_TEST_COMMANDS.md contains comprehensive GPU testing instructions including CUDA verification, memory monitoring, performance benchmarks, and expected timings. Scripts are ready for expansion indices integration - the GPU hardware optimization ensures that expansion indices processing will have adequate computational resources, and the testing framework provides validation mechanisms for the new feature's performance.
</info added on 2025-10-13T20:11:31.753Z>
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify that all identified scripts are accessible and readable, check for any syntax errors or missing dependencies

subtasks.title: Validate expansion indices compatibility in RunPod environment

subtasks.testStrategy: Test data loading with expansion indices on RunPod instance, validate model initialization with new parameters

subtasks.title: Verify GPU compatibility and resource allocation
subtasks.description: Check that the RunPod deployment scripts properly allocate GPU resources for models using expansion indices and validate compatibility with different GPU types
subtasks.details: Review GPU memory requirements for expanded models, check CUDA/cuDNN versions compatibility, validate batch size configurations, and ensure proper GPU selection logic in deployment scripts. Test with different GPU tiers available on RunPod.
subtasks.testStrategy: Run GPU compatibility tests on different RunPod instance types, monitor memory usage during model loading and training

subtasks.title: Test end-to-end deployment pipeline with expansion indices

subtasks.testStrategy: Run complete pipeline test with sample data, verify output correctness, and measure performance metrics against baseline

subtasks.title: Perform pre-push verification and documentation
